title: Laceration
description: A mod adding some blood themed weaponry and food to the game.
body:
_Laceration_ is a mod that adds **3 new weapons**, **3 new enchantments**, and **4 custom food items** to the game.

**Weapons:**
- Serrated Cleaver
  - Obtained from Vindicators (or crafted if using the 1.20.1 version)
  - Applies a bleed bonus damage on its critical
- Bloodwoven Needle
  - A slight downgrade from the Netherite Sword, mainly focused on the custom enchantments
- Bloodtassle Glaive
  - A balance between swords and axes

**Enchantments:**
- Bloodfeast
  - Grants health on kill, scaling on the max health of the victim
  - Can only be applied to the Glaive and Needle
- Sanguine Lunge
  - A dash that costs a slight amount of health on use
  - Can only be applied to the Glaive
- Stake
  - A interaction ability that will stun both you and your target, but will deal a large amount of chip damage to the victim
  - Can only be applied to the Needle

(All enchantments can be obtained via Evoker drops)
